component.name: Droppix
component.summary: Use a tablet as a second monitor

description.p: Droppix turns an Android tablet into a true extended monitor for a Linux/Wayland PC (KDE Plasma), with touch, stylus pressure, auto-rotation, and audio out to the tablet, over USB or WiFi.
Requires the host to provide the evdi kernel module, KDE Plasma, PipeWire, avahi, and adb; droppix reaches these host services via flatpak-spawn.
